_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular conformation of the full-length tumor suppressor NF2/Merlin--a small-angle neutron scattering study.

_contextSnippet: Circular dichroism (CD) experiments on Merlin(wt) and Merlin(S518D) yielded spectra with a strong positive peak at wavelength λ ∼195 nm and two strong negative peaks at ∼208 nm and ∼222 nm
details: Successfully measured CD spectra showing characteristic α-helical structure with strong positive peak at ~195 nm and negative peaks at ~208 nm and ~222 nm for both Merlin(wt) and Merlin(S518D)
